title: Dapr Actor
description: Represents a Dapr virtual actor instance, including its type, identifier, and associated timer and reminder configurations.

actorId.description: The unique identifier of the actor instance.

dueTime.description: Time after which the timer fires for the first time (ISO 8601 duration or time).

period.description: Time interval between timer fires (ISO 8601 duration).

callback.description: The name of the callback method to invoke.

data.description: Data to pass to the callback method.

reminder.description: Persistent reminder configuration for the actor. Reminders survive actor deactivations and failovers.

dueTime.description: Time after which the reminder fires for the first time.

data.description: Data to pass to the reminder callback.
